# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-application
description: A Helm chart for Kubernetes

type: application

version: 0.1.0

appVersion: 1.0.0

templates:
  - name: deployment.yaml
    data: |
      apiVersion: apps/v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
        name: {{ .Values.app.name }}
        labels:
          app: {{ .Values.app.name }}
      spec:
        replicas: {{ .Values.app.replicaCount }}
        selector:
          matchLabels:
            app: {{ .Values.app.name }}
        template:
          metadata:
            labels:
              app: {{ .Values.app.name }}
          spec:
            containers:
            - name: {{ .Values.app.name }}
              image: "{{ .Values.app.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.app.image.tag }}"
              ports:
              - containerPort: {{ .Values.app.service.port }}
                protocol: TCP

values:
  app:
    name: my-application
    replicaCount: 1
    image:
      repository: my-application
      tag: latest
    service:
      port: 8080
